input: Bug report from ai-agents PR #1965 (paraphrased). 'PR #1934 had 2 fix-loops + 5 commits + 4 Round-2 regressions because two systems drifted: /review (local slash command) and ai-pr-quality-gate.yml (CI workflow) used separate prompt copies that nobody kept in sync. Six axes were duplicated under .github/prompts/ and .claude/skills/review/. What is the root cause of the drift class and what is the smallest fix shape that prevents recurrence?'
